messages.content:
You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040)","mcu":"RP2040","i2c_default":{"sda":4,"scl":5},"spi_default":{"sck":18,"miso":16,"mosi":19,"cs":17},"uart_default":{"tx":0,"rx":1}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Blink the onboard LED at 1 Hz.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","native_usb":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Print Hello world over Serial every second.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-uno-r4-wifi","name":"Arduino UNO R4 WiFi","mcu":"RA4M1"}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a button on D2 with the internal pull-up and turn on the LED on D13 while it's pressed.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-uno-r4-wifi","name":"Arduino UNO R4 WiFi","mcu":"RA4M1","adc_pins":[14,15,16,17,18,19]}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a 10k pot on A0 and print the voltage in millivolts every 100 ms.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3"}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Fade an LED on GPIO5 with PWM, sine-wave brightness over 4 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040"}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Print a rising counter every 250 ms but never use delay().

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-nano-33-ble","name":"Arduino Nano 33 BLE","mcu":"nRF52840","native_usb":true}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Toggle D13 every time a falling edge arrives on D2 using attachInterrupt.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"seeed-xiao-esp32-c3","name":"Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3","mcu":"ESP32-C3"}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Echo every line typed on Serial back in upper case.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-esp32-s3","name":"Adafruit Feather ESP32-S3","mcu":"ESP32-S3","special":["NeoPixel on GPIO33 (power gate GPIO21)"]}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Set the onboard NeoPixel solid blue at low brightness.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040"}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Generate a 1 kHz square wave on GP14 using tone().
